data.content: Implementation review blocked: alias handling looks correct in src/lib/backends/beads-backend.ts and src/lib/bd.ts, and regression tests cover queued/in_action aliases, but required gate bun run build fails in the current checkout during prerender of /_global-error and /beats with React key warnings and TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'useContext'). Validation run: bunx tsc --noEmit passed; bun run test passed; bun run build failed.
